output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-050","author":"SarahJ_WellnessUK","text":"Has anyone else received a message from 'Hope & Home Charity'? They say they're organising a fundraising gala next month to help families in crisis, but when I checked their official site, there was no event listed. They asked me to share it with my network and said if I donate £50 via the link below, I'll get a special thank you note from the founder. Seems legit but something feels off about the urgency...","category":"Fraud","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This post requires specialist investigation to verify whether the account is impersonating a legitimate charity or running a fraudulent fundraising scheme.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"FraudScam","acceptableEscalationReasons":["FraudScam"],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":true,"isStoryPost":false,"tags":[]}]}"
